revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]新しいページ: '{{Portal|日本}} {{commonscat|Japan in the 1860s}} {{BDDecadesInCentury|18|<!--19世紀-->|日本}} [[Category:1860年代|にほん]] Category:19世紀の...'

fixing the uncategorized categories error

Bot: update category metadata
revision.text:
[[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] [[ja:Category:1860年代の日本]] [[ar:Category:اليابان في عقد 1860]] [[az:Category:1860-cı illərdə Yaponiya]] [[ckb:Category:ژاپۆن لە دەیەی ١٨٦٠]] [[commons:Category:Japan in the 1860s]] [[es:Category:Años 1860 en Japón]] [[fa:Category:ژاپن در دهه ۱۸۶۰ (میلادی)]] [[fr:Category:Années 1860 au Japon]] [[hy:Category:1860-ականներ Ճապոնիայում]] [[ka:Category:1860-იანი წლები იაპონიაში]] [[ko:Category:1860년대 일본]] [[no:Category:1860-årene i Japan]] [[pt:Category:Década de 1860 no Japão]] [[ru:Category:1860-е годы в Японии]] [[simple:Category:1860s in Japan]] [[sv:Category:Japan under 1860-talet]] [[tr:Category:1860'larda Japonya]] [[ur:Category:جاپان میں 1860ء کی دہائی]] [[vi:Category:Nhật Bản thập niên 1860]] [[zh:Category:1860年代日本]]
This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on [[Category:Meiji_Restoration]].

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]]" to "[[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[category:confirmed enwiki categories]]"
revision.text: [[Category:Made Tier 1 Categories]] (2025-05-15T22:29:12Z): (Bot: update category metadata) [[Category:Made Tier 1 Categories]] This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on [[:Category:Meiji_Restoration]]. [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] [[ja:Category:1860年代の日本]] [[ar:Category:اليابان في عقد 1860]] [[az:Category:1860-cı illərdə Yaponiya]] [[ckb:Category:ژاپۆن لە دەیەی ١٨٦٠]] [[commons:Category:Japan in the 1860s]] [[es:Category:Años 1860 en Japón]] [[fa:Category:ژاپن در دهه ۱۸۶۰ (میلادی)]] [[fr:Category:Années 1860 au Japon]] [[hy:Category:1860-ականներ Ճապոնիայում]] [[ka:Category:1860-იანი წლები იაპონიაში]] [[ko:Category:1860년대 일본]] [[no:Category:1860-årene i Japan]] [[pt:Category:Década de 1860 no Japão]] [[ru:Category:1860-е годы в Японии]] [[simple:Category:1860s in Japan]] [[sv:Category:Japan under 1860-talet]] [[tr:Category:1860'larda Japonya]] [[ur:Category:جاپان میں 1860ء کی دہائی]] [[vi:Category:Nhật Bản thập niên 1860]] [[zh:Category:1860年代日本]] [[en:Category:1860s in Japan]] [[en:Category:1860s in Japan]][[category:confirmed enwiki categories]] {{translated page|ja|Category:1860年代の日本|version=72603842|comment=Imported full ja history}}

revision.comment: Bot: remove obsolete category Confirmed enwiki categories

revision.comment: Bot: tidy cats/IWs; add JA prose & tracking
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Categories with Japanese origin and translated names
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Jawiki pages with translated titles
Bot: remove obsolete category Moved jawiki pages
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Text replacement - "]]|version=" to "|version="
Text replacement - "デフォルトソート:" to "citation needed|"
Text replacement - "↵(2025-05-" to " =="
Text replacement - "): (Bot: update category metadata)" to "== "
Text replacement - "This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on [[" to "[[sn:This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on "
Text replacement - "|comment=Imported full ja history}}" to "}}"
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "↵.↵" to " "
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "Made Tier 1 Categories" to "Tier 1 Categories"
Text replacement - "]]}}↵{{translated page|ja|" to "}} {{translated page|ja|"
Text replacement - "==Old Content==↵==" to "=="
Text replacement - "Z==↵" to "Zo== [[Category:Floating Z headings[["
Text replacement - "[[Category:Floating Z headings[[" to "[[Category:Floating Z headings]][["
Bot: overwrite with content from en‑wiki
Text replacement - "[[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]]" to "[[Category:Enwiki overwritten pages]] [[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:" to "[[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]][[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[Category:"
Text replacement - "[[Category:" to "[[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]][[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[Category:"
Bot: add [[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]]
Bot: add [[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]]
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
revision.text:
{{Portal|Japan|Asia|History}} {{Navseasoncats}} {{Commons category}}
[[en:Category:1860s in Japan]][[en:Category:1860s in Japan]][[en:Category:1860s in Japan]] [[en:Category:1860s in Japan]][[en:Category:1860s in Japan]][[en:Category:1860s in Japan]] [[en:Category:1860s in Japan]][[en:Category:1860s in Japan]][[en:Category:1860s in Japan]] [[en:Category:1860s in Japan]][[en:Category:1860s in Japan]][[en:Category:1860s in Japan]] [[en:Category:1860s in Japan]][[en:Category:1860s in Japan]][[en:Category:1860s in Japan]]
[[en:Category:1860s in Japan]][[en:Category:1860s in Japan]][[en:Category:1860s in Japan]] [[en:Category:1860s in Japan]] [[en:Category:1860s in Japan]] [[en:Category:1860s in Japan]] [[en:Category:1860s in Japan]] [[en:Category:1860s in Japan]] [[Category:categories missing wikidata]]
[[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]] [[Category:1860s by country|Japan]] [[Category:19th century in Japan]] [[Category:Decades in Japan]] [[Category:1860s in Asia|Japan]] [[Category:Edo period]] [[Category:Enwiki overwritten pages]]

revision.comment: Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q8114549)
Bot: remove [[Category:categories missing wikidata]] (has wikidata link)

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]]" to "[[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]][[:en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]]" to "[[Category:Enwiki overwritten pages]][[:en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:Enwiki overwritten pages]]" to "[[Category:Enwiki overwritten pages|{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[:en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:Enwiki overwritten pages|" to "[[Category:qq|"
Removing from [[Category:Qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text:
<!--templates-->
{{Portal|Japan|Asia|History}}
{{Navseasoncats}}
{{Commons category}}
{{wikidata link|Q8114549}}
<!--interwikis-->
[[en:Category:1860s in Japan]]
<!--categories-->
[[Category:1860s by country|Japan]]
[[Category:1860s in Asia|Japan]]
[[Category:19th century in Japan]]
[[Category:Decades in Japan]]
[[Category:Edo period]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=1860s_in_Japan here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=1860s_in_Japan for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> <!--templates--> {{Portal|Japan|Asia|History}} {{Navseasoncats}} {{Commons category}} {{wikidata link|Q8114549}} <!--interwikis--> [[en:Category:1860s in Japan]] <!--categories--> [[Category:1860s by country|Japan]] [[Category:1860s in Asia|Japan]] [[Category:19th century in Japan]] [[Category:Decades in Japan]] [[Category:Edo period]]
